title: Advanced Finance — Tax Lots, Dividends, Crypto, Net Worth, XIRR/Sharpe

test_results.failed_reason: All pre-existing: test_daemon_status_when_not_running (daemon is running), test_arxiv_live (HTTP 429 rate limit), test_arxiv_search_live (timeout after 429). No regressions.

overview: Built the Advanced Finance engine — tax-lot tracking with FIFO/LIFO disposal, dividend analytics via yfinance, tax-loss harvesting scanner with wash-sale rule detection, net worth timeline with equity+crypto+cash breakdown, XIRR computation (Newton + bisection fallback), Sharpe ratio, and multi-exchange crypto import with CoinGecko live pricing. Also overhauled the Globe visualization with 20 ambient city nodes, color-coded event categories, pulsing ring effects, and mesh-network arcs.

parts_completed.Phase1_DB_Schema: 4 new Postgres tables (tax_lots, dividends, net_worth_snapshots, crypto_positions) with proper indexes and constraints. Migration 35A added to migration system. Total tables: 15.
parts_completed.Phase2_Models: 4 new dataclass models (TaxLot, Dividend, NetWorthSnapshot, CryptoPosition) with computed properties (remaining_shares, cost_basis, is_long_term, annual_income_per_share) and to_dict() serialisation.
parts_completed.Phase3_Stores: 4 new async Postgres store classes (TaxLotStore, DividendStore, NetWorthStore, CryptoStore) with upsert semantics, FIFO/LIFO sell allocation, and row converter functions.
parts_completed.Phase4_Financial_Calcs: Pure-function finance module — XIRR (Newton's method + bisection fallback), Sharpe ratio (annualised), tax-loss harvesting scanner (30-day wash sale rule), annual dividend income estimator.
parts_completed.Phase5_Crypto: Multi-exchange CSV parsers (Coinbase, Kraken, Binance, Gemini, Generic) with auto-detection. CoinGecko free API integration for live crypto pricing (~40 coin mappings).
parts_completed.Phase6_CLI_Commands: 10 new CLI commands: dividends, lots, lots-add, lots-sell, harvest, net-worth, xirr, crypto import, crypto show. Total CLI commands: ~82.
parts_completed.Phase7_Globe_Overhaul: 20 ambient world-city nodes (SF, NYC, London, Tokyo, Shenzhen, etc.), color-coded event categories (8 colours), pulsing ring effects at 5 most recent events, mesh-network arcs (point-to-point instead of hub-spoke), category breakdown HUD replacing unhelpful legend.
parts_completed.Phase8_Tests: 71 new unit tests across 16 test classes covering models, financial calculations, crypto parsers, row converters, and store operations. All passing.

new_cli_commands: octane portfolio lots-add TICKER SHARES COST DATE [--broker] [--account]
octane portfolio lots-sell TICKER SHARES [--method FIFO|LIFO] [--execute]
new_db_tables: tax_lots — position_id FK, ticker, shares, cost_per_share, purchase_date, broker, account_id, sold_shares, notes
dividends — ticker, amount, ex_date, pay_date, frequency, div_yield, payout_ratio, growth_rate, source
net_worth_snapshots — snapshot_date (UNIQUE), total_value, equities_value, crypto_value, cash_value, position_count, notes
crypto_positions — coin, quantity, cost_per_coin, exchange, wallet_address, notes, UNIQUE(coin, exchange)

financial_features.XIRR: Newton's method with bisection fallback, handles multiple cashflows across dates
financial_features.Sharpe_Ratio: Annualised from daily returns, configurable risk-free rate and trading days
financial_features.Tax_Loss_Harvesting: Scans positions for unrealised losses above threshold, flags 30-day wash sale risk
financial_features.Dividend_Analytics: Fetches via yfinance, computes annual income per share accounting for frequency (quarterly/monthly/annual/semi-annual)
financial_features.FIFO_LIFO_Disposal: Tax lot sell allocation with both methods, preview before executing
financial_features.Net_Worth_Tracking: Aggregates equities (yfinance) + crypto (CoinGecko) + cash, snapshots for timeline

globe_improvements: 20 ambient city nodes so globe never looks empty
Color-coded event points: web=green, research=blue, extract=orange, inference=purple, agent=pink, memory=yellow, finance=teal, system=gray
Pulsing ring effects at 5 most recent event locations
Mesh-network arcs between recent events (replaces hub-spoke from SF)
Category breakdown HUD with event counts (replaces unhelpful 'N sources tracked' legend)
Darker globe material (#080818), wider atmosphere glow
